quote: The topic-wise practice helped me see exactly where I was weak and what to revise next.
The timed quantitative practice made FAST-style questions feel much more manageable.
The separate IQ and math practice gave me a clearer preparation routine.
I liked the connected verbal and analytical structure because it felt organized instead of scattered.
The essay and legal reasoning route helped me understand what to practise first.
The reading and writing samples are simple, direct and useful for band-focused practice.
